53	54	46	45	19	42	0	0	0	0	0	42	50	0	0	53	46	0	56	19	0	23	0	0	19	31	0	0	35	41	0	14	17	54	47	57	40	35	0	0	0	52	0	0	0	0	0	0	0	13	0	0	0	17	0	57	0	16	0	1	34	0	34	13	27	0	0	0	42	49	0	0	0	42	10	23	25	0	13	19	18	7	0	0	23	0	9	41	19	49	

#Weights:

22	16	28	22	5	5	10	30	18	12	8	26	1	5	27	24	4	5	7	13	11	10	30	27	8	8	30	8	8	10	10	9	13	1	14	21	26	13	12	21	10	14	28	4	5	20	25	11	8	14	16	27	17	3	23	10	17	11	16	8	17	20	28	7	17	15	13	29	2	14	29	28	1	23	23	23	29	15	6	28	22	1	5	25	1	26	19	23	7	5	
99 #capacity

15 #k: cardinality
